name: Armor, +1
stat_impact: +1 bonus to AC

name: Shield, +1
stat_impact: +1 bonus to AC (Total +3)

name: Adamantine Armor
stat_impact: Crit Immunity: Any critical hit against you becomes a normal hit.

name: Mariner’s Armor
stat_impact: Grants a Swimming Speed equal to your walking speed.

name: Mithral Armor
stat_impact: Removes Stealth Disadvantage and Strength requirements.

name: Sentinel Shield
stat_impact: Advantage on Initiative and Wisdom (Perception) checks.

name: Armor, +2
stat_impact: +2 bonus to AC

name: Shield, +2
stat_impact: +2 bonus to AC (Total +4)

name: Armor of Resistance
stat_impact: Grants Resistance to one specific damage type.

name: Armor of Vulnerability
stat_impact: Resistance to one physical type; Vulnerability to the other two.

name: Arrow-Catching Shield
stat_impact: +2 AC vs Ranged Attacks; can intercept attacks for allies within 5ft.

name: Dragon Scale Mail
stat_impact: +1 bonus to AC; Resistance to dragon's element; Advantage vs Frightful Presence.

name: Elven Chain
stat_impact: +1 bonus to AC; proficiency is granted while wearing.

name: Glamoured Studded Leather
stat_impact: +1 bonus to AC; can magically disguise armor as clothing.

name: Mizzium Armor
stat_impact: Crit Immunity; reduces damage from failed Strength/Constitution saves to 0.

name: Molten Bronze Skin
stat_impact: Resistance to Fire; armor cannot be removed against your will.

name: Shield of Missile Attraction
stat_impact: Resistance to Ranged Damage; forces all ranged attacks within 10ft to target you.

name: Armor, +3
stat_impact: +3 bonus to AC

name: Shield, +3
stat_impact: +3 bonus to AC (Total +5)

name: Animated Shield
stat_impact: Protects you while leaving hands free (Bonus Action to activate).

name: Demon Armor
stat_impact: +1 bonus to AC; Unarmed strikes deal 1d8 magical; Disadvantage vs Demons.

name: Dwarven Plate
stat_impact: +2 bonus to AC; can reduce forced movement by 10 feet as a reaction.

name: Spellguard Shield
stat_impact: Advantage on Saves vs Spells; Spell attacks have Disadvantage against you.

name: Crystal Armor
stat_impact: Resistance to Radiant/Necrotic; sheds light; can blind attackers.

name: Armor of Invulnerability
stat_impact: Resistance to all Non-Magical Damage; can grant 10 mins of Immunity.

name: Plate of Etherealness
stat_impact: Allows casting of Etherealness to move through walls/planes.

name: Armor of the Valiant Soul
stat_impact: +1 to +3 AC (scaling); Resistance to Psychic; Immunity to Frightened.

name: Scorpion Armor
stat_impact: +5 to Initiative; Immunity to Poison; deals damage to wearer if removed.

name: Obsidian Flint Plate
stat_impact: Resistance to Fire; attackers within 10ft take fire damage when hitting you.
